en-US.name: OmniVoice
en-US.summary: An intelligent AI voice assistant connected to advanced LLMs (OpenAI, DeepSeek, Llama, Gemini).
en-US.description: OmniVoice is your personal AI voice assistant on Alexa. Connect Alexa to any OpenAI-compatible LLM provider (including OpenRouter, Groq, Together AI, or OpenAI) to ask complex questions, get advanced explanations, brainstorm ideas, or have fluid, multi-turn conversations. Powered by state-of-the-art models like Gemini, DeepSeek, and Llama.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask Omni Voice what is quantum computing
Alexa, ask Omni Voice to write a poem

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Say 'Alexa, open Omni Voice' to start a conversation. Ask any question. The skill connects Alexa directly to your preferred LLM provider.
